infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sumsuma uses your camera to capture ID documents for identity verification (KYC).
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sumsuma accesses your photo library to upload ID documents for identity verification (KYC).
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Sumsuma uses Face ID to securely authenticate you and protect your financial account.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Sumsuma sends you transfer status updates, payment confirmations, and important account alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sumsuma may use your location to detect unusual account activity and protect against fraud.
